name: file_management
description: Proficiency in reading, writing, copying, and organizing files on the local filesystem
instructions_md: For file operations: 1) Always expand ~ in paths — tools handle this automatically. 2) Use file_read before overwriting to verify you have the right content. 3) Use file_list_dir with a glob pattern to discover files (e.g. "*.docx", "**/*.csv"). 4) Prefer file_append for log-style writes to avoid overwriting existing content. 5) Before file_delete, confirm the path is the correct target — deletions are irreversible.
